title: Temporally Controlled
description: Time lies in the palm of your hand
body:
# Temporally Controlled
This mod is a simple yet powerful mod that allows for the disruption of the time stream in survival mode.
## How to use
In order to disrupt the time stream, you need to craft a powerful clock, the Temporal Disruptor. This can be crafted with 7 gold nuggets, 1 iron nugget, and a clock. With your Disruptor, you can right-click it and a menu will open, with the option to set temporal speed (tps), or freeze/unfreeze time. Now your dominion over time begins!

## Questions
<details>
<summary>Will there be any more updates?</summary>
No. This is an end of life mod unless I see an opportunity to add something else.


</details>

<details>
<summary>Why is it on NeoForge?</summary>
Funny story, actually. I was using a now older version of MCreator to make this mod, but Forge didn't support the right version for these features, and I don't have a Fabric plugin. So NeoForge was my only option.


</details>

<details>
<summary>This can be done with cheats using the /tick command! What's the point of this?</summary>
For those who have no cheats but still want to mess with the time stream to wreak havoc on non-players.


</details>
